The market shaking the tree again and some fruit still falling. Each time there is less and eventually the markets get numb to news and sellers actually get exhausted. This is where the timeline actually gets bearish, before it was a lot of people still holding and hopeful.

I miss $ZEC as the clear leader, where everyone was piling in and seeing it do a liquid 10x from the bottom. I only caught part of the move but it was very reminiscent of former market conditions with a consistent trend. Waiting for the next one...

Most people fail to make money in crypto because they slow down and lose their hunger when the market gets tough.  

The wins you enjoy in good times come from the effort you invested in the hard times.

$ZEC as a leader is powerful because the narrative is easily digestible, the fundamentals are solid, and the extras (no VC unlocks, dino coin, strong community) are there.

Contrast that with other random pumps like $ICP  etc when there is no logic makes it much harder.
